examples: Transfers of liquid cultures can also be made by pipette.
The chemist sucked up 20 cc. of acetic acid into a pipette.
It had a movable mechanical arm with a slender proboscis-like pipette at the tip.
At random intervals during the tour, Gegenbauer stops for a tasting, dropping tiny samples of the balsamic and fruit vinegars onto the tongues of his guests using a pipette.
